summary: Tested all reported issues as platform admin (admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! + partner_code: automate-accounts). All 4 reported issues are NOT reproducible in current code state: (1) No TypeScript 'Compiled with problems' overlay; (2) Cart /cart page loads checkout sections with 3 dropdowns (4 options each); (3) Admin Orders 'Create Manual Order' shows 38 product options; (4) Admin Subscriptions 'Create Manual Subscription' shows 39 product options. All fixes from iteration_84 are in place and working correctly for platform admin role.

integration_issues.issue: Console errors: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' appear in ALL tabs. This is caused by Emergent Visual Editor injecting x-file-name spans inside select/option elements - NOT a real production bug. Same as noted in iteration_84.

critical_code_review_comments: RESOLVED: Cart.tsx TypeScript errors from iteration_84 are confirmed fixed - no 'Compiled with problems' overlay for platform admin.
INFO: The console errors about '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' are a dev-environment artifact from Emergent Visual Editor injection, not production code issues.

INFO: Platform admin ('admin@automateaccounts.local') has role 'platform_admin' which is NOT in require_admin's allowed roles list ('admin', 'super_admin'). However the user has is_admin=True flag so access control works. This is a subtle fragility - if is_admin flag is removed, platform_admin role would be blocked from all admin endpoints.
INFO: The 'All Tenants' TenantSwitcher is visible for platform_admin - they see ALL tenants' data by default (no tenant filter), which is correct platform admin behavior.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing prod_zoho_crm_express product via localStorage cart injection for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 original bugs (cart dropdowns, admin manual order products, subscriptions products) are working correctly for BOTH superadmin@automateaccounts.local AND platform admin (admin@automateaccounts.local). TypeScript fixes from iteration_84 are in place. The app compiles successfully with 1 ESLint warning only. Cart uses localStorage key 'aa_cart_items' - can inject test items programmatically. Admin test data-testids: admin-create-sub-btn (Subscriptions 'Create Manual' button), manual-sub-product-select (subscription product dropdown), manual-order-product-select (order product dropdown), admin-tab-orders/subscriptions (tab navigation). Emergent Visual Editor console errors about <span> inside <option> are dev-environment artifacts only.

original_report_vs_reality.description: Platform admin reported issues (1) cart dropdowns not visible and (2) manual order product dropdown empty. Previous iteration_84 fixed TypeScript errors in Cart.tsx/WebsiteContext.tsx that were causing 'Compiled with problems' overlay in dev mode. Current state: all fixes are in place and working correctly for platform admin. The previous test only used superadmin credentials - this test confirmed the same fixes work for platform_admin role too.
original_report_vs_reality.verification: Playwright tests confirmed: (1) login succeeds, (2) no TypeScript overlay, (3) cart shows 2 checkout sections with 3 select dropdowns (4 options each), (4) Admin Orders manual order dialog has 38 product options, (5) Admin Subscriptions manual subscription dialog has 39 product options.
